meaning: n.闄勫甫鐜拌薄,鍋跺彂鐥囩姸
examples: They say that the mind is just an epiphenomenon.
Plantaris bend malformation of ankle joint, a serious epiphenomenon will occurs when patients lie on bed for a long time.
Or that a service is an emergent property, an epiphenomenon, coming into existence because all of these activities happening?
The CPI explosion of the time was an epiphenomenon.
